goal: is_lower_bound(p, a) = forall(x0: P) { p(x0) implies a <= x0 }
proof: function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0) { forall(x2: T0) { not x0(x2) or x1 <= x2 } = is_lower_bound[T0](x0, x1) }[P](p, a)
p(x)
is_lower_bound(p, a)
(forall(x0: P) { not p(x0) or a <= x0 } = true)
function(x0: P) { not (p(x0) and not a <= x0) }(x)
function(x0: P) { not p(x0) or a <= x0 }(x)

goal: is_upper_bound(p, b) = forall(x0: P) { p(x0) implies x0 <= b }
proof: function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0) { forall(x2: T0) { not x0(x2) or x2 <= x1 } = is_upper_bound[T0](x0, x1) }[P](p, b)
p(x)
is_upper_bound(p, b)
(forall(x0: P) { not p(x0) or x0 <= b } = true)
function(x0: P) { not (p(x0) and not x0 <= b) }(x)
function(x0: P) { not p(x0) or x0 <= b }(x)
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not is_lower_bound[T0](x0, x1) or not x0(x2) or x1 <= x2 }[P](p, a, x)
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0 <= x1 or not x1 <= x2 or x0 <= x2 }[P](c, a, x)
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0) { forall(x2: T0) { not x0(x2) or x1 <= x2 } = is_lower_bound[T0](x0, x1) }[P](p, c)
let w0: P satisfy { p(w0) and not c <= w0 }
function(x0: P) { not p(x0) or c <= x0 }(w0)
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not is_upper_bound[T0](x0, x1) or not x0(x2) or x2 <= x1 }[P](p, b, x)
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0 <= x1 or not x1 <= x2 or x0 <= x2 }[P](x, b, c)
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0) { forall(x2: T0) { not x0(x2) or x2 <= x1 } = is_upper_bound[T0](x0, x1) }[P](p, c)
let w0: P satisfy { p(w0) and not w0 <= c }
function(x0: P) { not p(x0) or x0 <= c }(w0)
(forall(x0: P) { not p(x0) or q(x0) } = true)
function(x0: P) { not (p(x0) and not q(x0)) }(x)
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0, x2: T0) { not is_lower_bound[T0](x0, x1) or not x0(x2) or x1 <= x2 }[P](q, a, x)

let w0: P satisfy { p(w0) and not a <= w0 }
function(x0: P) { not p(x0) or a <= x0 }(w0)

function(x0: P) { not (p(x0) and not q(x0)) }(x)

let w0: P satisfy { p(w0) and not w0 <= b }
function(x0: P) { not p(x0) or x0 <= b }(w0)
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0) { (x0(x1) and is_lower_bound[T0](x0, x1)) = is_least[T0](x0, x1) }[P](p, a)
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0) { (x0(x1) and is_lower_bound[T0](x0, x1)) = is_least[T0](x0, x1) }[P](p, a)

function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0) { (is_upper_bound[T0](x0, x1) and forall(x2: T0) { not is_upper_bound[T0](x0, x2) or x1 <= x2 }) = is_lub[T0](x0, x1) }[P](p, b)
